inputs.label: PIN Length
inputs.businessContext: Number of digits in the generated PIN

inputs.label: Seed Number
inputs.businessContext: Unique numeric seed for PIN derivation

inputs.label: Shift Factor
inputs.businessContext: Offset to create different PINs from same seed

formulas.pinCalculation: Math.floor(Math.abs(Math.sin(seed * multiplier + shiftFactor)) * Math.pow(10, pinLength + 3)) % Math.pow(10, pinLength)

breakdown: Calculate absolute sine of (seed * multiplier + shiftFactor)
Modulo 10^pinLength to constrain to desired digit range
